features.name: Local Session Authentication
features.description: Ability to log in manually via headed Playwright and save session locally.

features.name: S3 Session Synchronization
features.description: Ability to upload/download zipped IG session data to AWS S3.

features.name: Distributed Concurrency Locks
features.description: DynamoDB-backed locks to prevent concurrent script execution.

features.name: DM Scraping Flow
features.description: Read unread messages and use AI to formulate replies.
features.notes: Pending fixes: scraper is not correctly identifying unread messages.

features.name: Scheduled Content Posting
features.description: Post text/images according to a schedule.

features.name: Veo Video Ad Generation
features.description: Call Veo API to generate a video ad.

features.name: Instagram Video Posting
features.description: Automated Playwright flow to upload a local video file.
